  raw HTML table with AdminKpiCard + AdminDataTable + AdminStatusBadge;

  max-w-7xl, modern Link API (drop legacyBehavior)
- delete dead v1 primitives (AdminPageHeader, AdminEmptyState)

  text-sm font-medium

Fase 2 of admin/member design-system alignment. Build verified."

$script = @'
export PGPASSWORD='QDmuMYWARA6TwXxOisdLWRQcdFMbbwT4'
PSQL="psql -h 127.0.0.1 -U ruangtato -d ruangtato -tA"
echo "TABLES:"; $PSQL -c "SELECT count(*) FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema='public';"
echo "--- row counts ---"
for t in user studios payments subscriptions leads account session invoices roles audit_logs; do
  c=$($PSQL -c "SELECT count(*) FROM \"$t\";" 2>/dev/null)
  echo "$t = $c"
done
echo "--- super_admin check ---"
$PSQL -c "SELECT email, platform_role, status FROM \"user\" WHERE platform_role IS NOT NULL;"
'@

$script = @'
echo "=== nginx config files ==="
ls -la /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/ 2>/dev/null
echo "=== ruangtato config installed? ==="
test -f /etc/nginx/sites-available/ruangtato && echo "YES installed" || echo "NOT installed (still in ~)"

systemctl is-active nginx
echo "=== DNS resolution of ruangtato.com (from VPS) ==="
getent hosts ruangtato.com || echo "no A record resolving yet"
echo "=== pm2 app still online ==="
pm2 pid ruangtato 2>/dev/null && echo "online" || echo "check pm2"
'@
$b64 = [Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes($script))
ssh -i "$env:USERPROFILE\.ssh\ruangtato_vps" tato@187.77.147.156 "echo $b64 | base64 -d | bash"
